Author: You
Name: Bisme
Punchline: In-game meld optimizer with BiS targets and overcap awareness.
Description: FFXIV in-game meld optimizer. Pick a job, load your equipped gear, click Auto-Optimize: the plugin picks the best food and places materia to match the BiS target while respecting per-piece stat caps. Auto-detects job changes and preloads equipped gear. Patch 7.4 i790 BiS data embedded.
Changelog: 1.2.0: Auto-detect job changes — switching class in-game now automatically syncs the optimizer to the new job and reloads equipped gear.
